name: Helena Sable
role: Info broker, runs the Gilt Rose
notes: 16% Long Arm Trading partner. Access to Casvath coastal relay via Morrow and Selt.
personality_traits: Extraordinarily capable. Works when frightened.
personality_quirks: Cried once privately at Pirra's return, composed completely afterward. Reveals nothing she doesn't choose to.

name: Captain Crane
appearance: Human man, fifties. Practical uniform, nothing decorative.
personality_traits: Formerly corrupt, genuinely flipped. Trustworthy within his authority. Practical.

name: Jessyl Denmar
role: River Quarter leader, runs Loan Dragon
notes: Managing Pip situation. Arranged Tormund Coalbeard meeting for Rhuna.
personality_traits: Reliable, pragmatic, excellent field contacts.

name: Aldous Marre
appearance: Older human man. Precise in movement and dress.
notes: Drafted Dawn Blades charter. Charter complete, council vote in 5 days. 100g owed on completion.
personality_traits: Precise, methodical.

name: Magistrate Orvyn
notes: Handled overflow warehouse title search and ship registration papers.
personality_traits: Supportive, discreet.

name: Councillor Adara Voss
personality_traits: Not corrupt. Opposed to Dawn Blades as potential private army.
personality_quirks: Morning tea, Crestfall Street, eighth bell daily.

name: Big Tam
notes: Flipped early campaign.
personality_traits: Reliable muscle.

name: Gritch
notes: Flipped early campaign.
personality_traits: Reliable muscle.

name: Torvald Ironwood
notes: Reliable contact for weapon and armor work.
personality_traits: Reliable.

name: Ossivane Relk
appearance: Sixties, slight, unremarkable face, clever eyes.
notes: Departed for Argentveil. Find him Linden Street antiquities market.
personality_traits: Criteria-based client selection.

name: Tarn
notes: Not always loyal to Dawn Blades or the idea of going clean. Warning given.
personality_traits: Stalling on legitimacy.

name: Tormund Coalbeard
notes: Millhaven approach planning with Rhuna.

name: Morrow
notes: Casvath coastal relay. Say 'grey tide is running' — sends messages within the hour along coastal road north.

name: Selt
notes: Casvath coastal relay. Say 'grey tide is running' — sends messages within the hour along coastal road north.

name: Idy Rossel
notes: Owns Shrike's Perch neutral ground tavern with private Rookery meeting rooms. Near the Gilt Rose.
personality_traits: Ex-smuggler.

name: Darius Rent
role: Runs Wayward Warehouse job board, Trade District
notes: Legitimate mercenary work source.
personality_traits: Legitimate. Good standing with Dawn Blades.

name: Marcus Freeborn
appearance: Human man, late twenties. Formerly enslaved. Wears Egarryn's red masterwork leather armor deliberately — nobody has asked why yet.
personality_traits: Quiet in the way of someone still finding his voice.
personality_quirks: Gravitating toward leadership naturally, hasn't noticed.

items.name: Egarryn's Red Masterwork Leather Armor
items.notes: Worn deliberately. Nobody has asked why yet.

name: Corwin Drake
notes: Holds Ravenquay sending stone.
personality_traits: Knows everyone in Ravenquay who owes favors.
personality_quirks: Walks patrol routes even off duty.

name: Sarith Vex
notes: Formal Dawn Blades member, no conflicting contracts.
personality_traits: Has been running dangerous operations since sixteen. Captain's awareness of every person in a room.

name: Ledwent
appearance: Human man, older. Dark complexion. Impeccable bearing and timing.
personality_traits: Completely reliable. 11 years in post.
personality_quirks: Reveals nothing he doesn't choose to.

name: Cruze
personality_traits: Reliable security.

name: Torsten
personality_traits: Reliable security.

name: Gunner
personality_traits: Reliable security.

name: Crispin
notes: Family debt being resolved via Rendwick.

name: Tova
role: Analyst — ledgers and shell company thread
notes: Working ledgers and shell company thread with Lenn.
personality_traits: Precise, careful. Extraordinary with numbers and patterns. Not a fighter, entirely invaluable.

name: Drev
notes: Completely disappeared.
personality_traits: Careful tidiness of a man demonstrating reliability through his surroundings.

name: Rendall
appearance: Human man, thirties. Slight, ink on fingers. Clean, competent.
notes: Harbor watch on all three Dawn Blades ships.
personality_traits: Clean, competent. Reorganized Glicken's desk immediately.

name: Harwick
notes: Built relay network with rotating 7-day cipher (Lenn improved it). Wool business selling to Argentveil consortium — half proceeds to Dawn Blades.
personality_traits: Careful tidiness of a man demonstrating reliability through his surroundings.

name: Toreval Caine
personality_traits: Self-contained composure of someone who learned to keep his face neutral around dangerous people.

name: Fennick
appearance: Broad-shouldered, weathered. Longshoreman's build with guard's eyes.
personality_traits: Twelve years moving cargo, asking no questions. Now asking them.

name: Aldric Foss
notes: Staying at estate. Supplying barrels for winery operation.

name: Sovi
appearance: Girl, approximately ten. Small, serious assessment eyes. Dark hair. Carries notebook always.
notes: Dusken Coast origin. Staying at Khemrise estate.
personality_traits: Drawing prodigy. Serious, assessing.
personality_quirks: Doesn't cry easily. Speaks a southern language — Petra has partial fluency. Learning common quickly.

name: Davoreen
notes: Sister somewhere in Khemrise — finding her is on the list.
personality_traits: Careful stillness of someone who survived by becoming invisible, now discovering she doesn't need to.
personality_quirks: Conducting one-on-ones with refugees. Finding her voice.

name: Legend
appearance: Sixties, lean, precise hands. Medical bag always on hook by door out of long habit.
notes: Near the harbor, 20 minutes from Fogstone.
personality_traits: Precise. Works freely now.
personality_quirks: Medical bag always on hook by the door — long habit.

name: Aldric
notes: Trevash fisherman. Know every cove and inlet between Trevash and Khemrise. Broken tooth cove 2 miles north of Trevash — deep, hidden, only they know it. Dawn Blades informants on coastal road.

name: Pell
notes: Trevash fisherman. Know every cove and inlet between Trevash and Khemrise. Broken tooth cove 2 miles north of Trevash — deep, hidden, only they know it. Dawn Blades informants on coastal road.

name: Rosten Alurath
notes: Antiquities shop, Merchant Quarter. Worth a visit.

items.name: Locket
items.notes: Returned by Vaz as trust gesture.

name: Merren
notes: Now in Ravenquay.

name: Casvath
appearance: Sixties, silver at temples. Weathered from sea time without being a sailor.
notes: Funded Dawn Blades 15,000g. Coastal relay network via Morrow and Selt — grey tide running. Second payment on Khemrise confirmed clean. Contact through Morrow and Selt.

name: Rendwick Pendwick
notes: Freed, reunited with family. Selling wool business to Argentveil consortium. Available for wool logistics.
personality_quirks: "When you need wool moved, find me."

name: Galealzre
notes: Receiving sending stone pair and full intelligence letter.

name: Erasmus
notes: Probably checks Wayward Warehouse. Still available.
personality_traits: Purely transactional, no loyalty.
combat_notes: 300g per job, purely transactional, no loyalty.

name: Vethara
notes: Vrethka's daughter. War ending — given two weeks before approaching Cindermarch. Proud, practical, afraid of being wrong and learning to survive it. Northern metalwork trade contact.

name: Varath Ichta
notes: Dawn Blades and Long Arm Trading Ambassador to the North. She is a northerner that always wanted to venture south.

name: Tielle Vorn
personality_traits: Methodical, emotionally contained about personal losses.
notes: Holds and manages every sending stone in the network so Vaz can communicate with everyone through her.

name: Oswin Belverbridge
personality_traits: Principled, moved by what's happening.
notes: Bought Fogstone Estate for 10,000g as decoy — Vaz buys it back for 10,500g when threat passes. Called emergency council session, charter passed unanimously. Family dinner at Fogstone established genuine alliance.

name: Sona Belverbridge
personality_traits: Immediately operational. Strong instincts, organizational mind.
personality_quirks: Corrected Ledwent's supply manifest within hours and was right. Ledwent noticed and chose not to point it out — highest possible compliment.
notes: Not yet tested under pressure but showing significant promise.

name: Aldous Fenn
role: Khemrise city councillor, former Guard captain
personality_traits: Clean, reliable, principled, not corrupt.
personality_quirks: Moved by Dov speaking at the charter session.
notes: Presented evidence at charter session including Holst evidence. Dawn Blades' man on the Khemrise council alongside Oswin.

name: Commander Brennan
personality_traits: Clean, fully cooperative post-charter. Professional.

name: Erren Sault
personality_traits: Professional, experienced with unusual cargo arrangements.
notes: Yetgrese trading experience. Handled weapons sale negotiation — opened 35,000g, floor 26,000g. Outcome not fully confirmed.

name: Yasmina
personality_traits: Precise, professional.
notes: Handled Merchant's Guild counterfeit note presentation to Corev Aldrath. Invaluable on document authentication and forgery detection.

name: Dov Carren
personality_traits: Nervous but spoke at charter session anyway. Left without asking to stay — showed character.
personality_quirks: Vaz tousled his hair which he hated with the full dignity of a 15-year-old.
notes: Family: mother and sister Bren (9). Father didn't know about false mill work promise. Spoke at charter session, moved two council members. Sent back to Valdmere on Shalindra.

name: Essa Vane
appearance: Experienced captain, lost her ship to a storm two years ago.
personality_traits: Professional, decisive. Doesn't need things explained twice.
personality_quirks: Accepted the name Shalindra seriously because sailors take ship names seriously.
notes: Found at harbor authority office. Terms: captaincy, Dawn Blades eyes and ears in Valdmere, home port Valdmere. Sending stone paired to Tielle's network.

name: Fora Withers
location: Millhaven road (2 miles south of Cindermarch)
personality_traits: Ran neutral ground waystation 20 years.
notes: Held Kern's message for Vaz, gave it on the road rather than waiting. Road contact.

name: Constable Renn
personality_traits: Quietly reliable. Was waiting for someone to do something about Ironvein the whole time.
notes: Wrote character letter for Brennswick notary. Took three surviving guards without ceremony.

name: Fosswick
personality_traits: Clean, professional. Stayed voluntarily.
notes: Eight years in Millhaven, never trusted by Ironvein. Came immediately when Kerra fetched him. Helping with collar removal and worker recovery. Potential permanent Dawn Blades asset.

name: Aldren Caluverath
appearance: Late thirties, thin from three years of hard labor adequately fed.
personality_quirks: Sleeping outside because he needed to feel the air.

name: Dunwell
role: Magical supply shop owner, Merchant Quarter
notes: Harwick vouched for her, expecting future contact. Jaygar's crystal components request being routed through her. First name not established.

name: Corvel Andris
personality_traits: Particular about who she works with. Drinks tea at Meridian House every morning.
notes: Established three permanent Teleportation Circles in her career, all still active. Alurath's referral will get a conversation. Potential Argentveil teleportation anchor.

name: Fenkirq Goalt
notes: Went by Farendale for a time. Previous owner of the Merchant Quarter estate acquired by Dawn Blades. Ring of Mind Shielding (inhabited) returned to him — contains one of his relatives. This quest/story is complete for now.

name: Wren
role: Beer hall worker, cliff hill establishment
appearance: From the coast originally, moved to Argentveil eight years ago.
personality_traits: Warm, genuine, professional without being impersonal. Knows everyone on the hill.
notes: Lives twenty minutes from Dawn Blades rental at Crestline and Vane. Chosen for personality as much as appearance.

name: Sael
personality_traits: Straightforwardly kind with no angle to it. Finds what he has sufficient, no apparent desire for more.
personality_quirks: Has a small sailing boat, fishes when he feels like it, takes people out sometimes. Nothing that requires him to be somewhere specific.

name: Hallan
notes: Merchant Quarter at the end of Silverline Court.

name: Vrethka
appearance: Human woman, sixties. Northern clan markings covering most visible skin — more than Vethara, a lifetime written in ink. Moves like someone who has never wasted a step in her life.
notes: Spell save DC 16 and spell attack +8 are explicitly defined and override dnd_utils calculations — homebrew class doesn't follow standard proficiency+ability formula exactly. Short rest spell slot recovery.
personality_traits: Economical in the way her daughter isn't quite yet. Doesn't explain herself unless explanation will help someone. Will sit in silence for an hour with a stone and consider it time well spent. Has strong opinions about how fires should be built.
personality_quirks: The clan markings tell stories she'll share if asked directly and not otherwise. Was right about staying for four generations and right about leaving now — experiences neither as contradiction.

features.name: Sacred Focus: Mind (add WIS modifier to INT and CHA checks and saving throws)
Totemic Assault (on hit with weapon or cantrip: 1d8 lightning or cold damage)
Life Bearer (when casting a healing spell: add WIS modifier to healing done)
Totemic Blessing (bind a totem and use its effect as bonus action when healing an ally)
Spirit Communion 1/long rest (speak with any spirit within one mile, ask three questions)

totem_spirits.name: Spirit of the Ancient Stone
totem_spirits.effect: Allies within 10ft gain +1 AC while she concentrates.
totem_spirits.flavor: The valley floor remembering its own endurance.

totem_spirits.name: Spirit of the Ancestors
totem_spirits.effect: Once per short rest: grant an ally advantage on a WIS or CON saving throw as a reaction.

name: Maeris
notes: Captained the ship for forty years holding something powerful under a shielding bubble. Dawn Blades freed the entity and returned it to its plane. Sailing is all she knows and has little experience with even other humanoids.

name: Sevrath
description: A transmutation mage with a side skill of making maps that magically update in real time. He has a studio in the transmutation tower in Argentveil and established a teleportation circle there. Originally from Valdmere, still has family there.

name: Orvha
role: External commerce handler for the orc neighborhood
appearance: Orc woman, fifties, broad and capable, dark hair streaked with grey, calm steady eyes that have been reading people across a trading table for twenty years
description: Handles all external commercial relationships for the Argentveil orc neighborhood. Twenty years experience navigating the city's merchant quarter on behalf of her community. Strong opinions about pricing transparency and has built a reliable detector for the difference between partners and exploiters. Not easily impressed but moves decisively when she decides to trust someone. Agreed to a Long Arm Trading partnership with full pricing transparency as a condition.

name: Thorvane
description: has done a Yetgrese crossing twice

name: Sivenne
description: Experienced steward, managing the Cliff House in Argentveil.

name: Aeveth
appearance: Human woman, late thirties. Dark hair kept practically. Ink on her fingers that never fully washes out. The kind of attractive that becomes more apparent the longer you're in conversation with her because she's entirely unaware of it.
personality_traits: Precise about things that matter, entirely imprecise about things that don't. Will forget to eat when working. Remembers everything she's read. Asks questions that sound simple and aren't.
personality_quirks: Has strong opinions about how people misunderstand pre-settlement Argentveil and will share them whether asked or not. Keeps three projects running simultaneously and claims to find this restful. Has been with Galealzre four years and considers their arrangement entirely normal.
notes: Galealzre's partner of four years, kept private until Vaz asked directly. Specializes in pre-settlement Argentveil history — potentially significant resource regarding the sunken warship in the harbor waters and the pre-separation orcish horn. Will want to see Relk's coin purchases and the horn. Galealzre describes her as an academic. She would describe herself as someone trying to stop people from being wrong about history.
